data.revised_prompt: Clean HD 2D game monster concept art for a cultivation roguelite: a new hostile late-run boss/elitemob for "Samsara Ascension," inspired by thunder-tribulation and xianxia cultivation boss aesthetics. Subject is a tribulation thunder demon general: humanoid boss silhouette, full body visible, top-down 45-degree three-quarter RPG view, centered with generous padding, stable feet anchor, battle-ready idle pose, occupies about 70% of the canvas. Blackened forged armor plates cracked with glowing blue-white lightning veins, long tattered robe panels made of scorched cloth, horn-like crown, stern masked face, clawed gauntlets, floating thunder talismans kept close to the body, compact storm aura contained within the silhouette and canvas, readable as a premium hostile xianxia boss monster. Style: polished fantasy RPG asset, clean HD hand-painted 2D concept, crisp silhouette, controlled painterly detail, simplified fine details, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Lighting and mood: storm-lit rim light, internal thunder glow from cracks, dramatic but gameplay-readable contrast. Palette: charcoal black, storm blue, electric cyan, muted silver, faint ember violet accents minimal; avoid magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: forged dark metal, scorched cloth, lightning energy fissures, talisman paper with metallic edges. Constraints: single monster only, no scene background, no UI, no text, no watermark, no extra enemies, no oversized detached lightning arcs, keep aura compact, strong game-readable silhouette, simplify ornamental detail while preserving premium hand-painted look. Background: perfectly flat solid chroma-key magenta #FF00FF only, uniform color, no shadows, no gradients, no texture, no floor plane, no lighting variation.
